content: Indirect prompt injection via ingested content: EchoLeak (CVE-2025-32711) zero-click exfiltration from M365 Copilot via crafted email + markdown image beacon; hidden instructions in white-on-white text, HTML comments, unicode; one poisoned document contaminates every downstream query; MCP tool descriptions themselves are an injection vector; risk class persists for any RAG assistant wired to corporate data/tools. Sources: Rescana, Sentra, arxiv 2509.10540, Lakera, VentureBeat, Cohesity.
